name: covdiff
purpose: Coverage on changed lines: intersects code coverage with the git diff and reports exactly which CHANGED lines were never executed by the tests, per file, with a summary ratio and an optional --min gate. Turns 'are my edits tested?' from a vibe into a number.
reach_for_me_when: you finished a change and want to know if the lines you touched are actually tested
you want a CI gate on changed-line coverage, not whole-repo coverage
you need the exact uncovered changed lines to write the missing tests

commands.name: check
commands.summary: Report uncovered changed lines vs a base; optional --min gate (exit 1 below floor)
